holdings.infoBox: BBMC is an equity ETF with a total of 559 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sandisk stock at 5.22%, Coherent at 1.28%, Lumentum Holdings at 1.24%, JPMorgan U.S. Government Money Market Fund Class IM at 1.21%, and Ciena at 1.19%.

overview.description: The JPMorgan BetaBuilders U.S. Mid Cap Equity ETF (BBMC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in mid cap equity. The fund tracks an index of US mid-cap equities, selected and weighted by market cap. BBMC was launched on Apr 14, 2020 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.

data.text: NEW YORK, March 27, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- J.P. Morgan Asset Management today announced the upcoming exchange listing transfer of 14 ETFs from their current exchanges including the NASDAQ Stock Market L...

data.title: How To Avoid The Worst Style ETFs 1Q22
data.text: The large number of ETFs has little to do with serving investors' best interests. Here are three red flags investors can use to avoid the worst ETFs.
